title: Captain Terrik (disambiguation)
content:
'''Captain Terrik''' can refer to:

*[[Booster Terrik]], captain of the Star Destroyer ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]''
*[[Mod Terrik]], captain of the [[Zeta Squadron (Desert Sands)|Zeta Squadron]] sandtrooper unit on Tatooine.

{{Disambig}}
